description: Set up autoresearch harness and recorded baseline render benchmark
Measured baseline noise floor without code changes
Tried Output fast-path branches for string targets to avoid trait dispatch in write_str/write_char
Optimize upper filter with ASCII no-op fast path to avoid redundant case conversion
Tried ASCII-specific to_ascii_uppercase path in upper filter for lowercase ASCII strings
Add html-escape precheck and direct write_str fast path for strings without escapable chars
Specialized HTML formatter for primitive ValueRepr variants to bypass Value Display dispatch
Attempted to force-inline write_with_html_escaping in utils hot path
Tried simpler any(matches!) implementation for needs_html_escaping byte scan
Control run without code changes to re-check variance after recent edits
Second control run; observed benchmark noise drifting higher on current machine load
Bypass formatter callback for default formatter using formatter_is_default fast path
Tried force-inlining Environment::format after adding default formatter fast path
Rewrote undefined-check match in Environment::format as early-return if branch
Forced inline on get_or_lookup_local cache helper in VM
Added aggressive inlining hints to VM stack push/pop and call-arg helpers
Specialize VM Emit for default formatter to bypass Environment::format call and branch directly to write_escaped
Tested Value handle registry switch from BTreeMap to HashMap for Value::serialize roundtrip path
Tried larger initial VM stack capacity (32) to reduce Value Vec reallocations
Checked existing unit assertion confirming Value size is 24 bytes on 64-bit targets
Tried unsafe unchecked VM stack pop to reduce Option/unwrap overhead on Value moves
Refactored internal Value roundtrip handle registry from keyed map to stack-based pop path in serializer
Switched VM frame locals from BTreeMap to HashMap to test faster local lookup/store
Hoisted default formatter and strict undefined checks out of VM loop for Emit instruction
Tried manual ASCII lowercase byte scan in upper filter no-op fast path
Repeat measurement for manual ASCII lowercase scan in upper fast path
Added Object::get_value_by_str path and specialized map lookups to avoid temporary Value key allocations (run 1)
Add Object::get_value_by_str fast path and optimize Value-keyed map string lookups for small maps
Tried manual loop implementation for small Value-map string lookups instead of iterator find_map
Tuned Value-map get_value_by_str linear-scan threshold from <=8 to <=16
Tuned Value-map get_value_by_str linear-scan threshold from <=8 to <=4
Control run on current best code to observe machine noise after Value lookup optimization
Forced inline on Value::get_attr and get_attr_fast after get_value_by_str refactor
Added get_value_by_str overrides for MergeDict and Namespace objects to avoid temporary Value keys
Tried splitting Option arg-count handling at VM call sites to favor fixed-arity paths
Use string-keyed BTreeMap in hidden context! builder to avoid Value-key conversion overhead
Follow-up measurement of string-keyed context map showed significant run-to-run variance under current load
Tried static-str context map keys with direct Object impl for BTreeMap<&'static str, _> to eliminate key allocations
Prototype context! ContextMap object failed to compile due Debug impl using wrong iterator item type
Tested custom Vec-backed ContextMap object for context! macro to avoid tree map overhead
